summary: Completed testing of iteration 7 new features: Transaction ID duplicate prevention, professional logging, enhanced stock alerts with severity/deficit, and held orders expiry behavior. All 67 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Stock page shows severity icons, summary bar with counts, and deficit column. POS page sends transaction_id with each sale.

issues: All 200 products show as 'fara stoc' (critical) with 0 'stoc scazut' (warning) - this is due to test data having negative stock values from previous test runs, not a UI bug

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/sales with transaction_id prevents duplicate (returns same sale on retry)
Backend: POST /api/sales without transaction_id creates new sale each time
Backend: GET /api/stock/alerts returns products with severity field (critical/warning)
Backend: Stock alerts sorted by severity (critical first) then by deficit descending
Backend: Stock alerts deficit calculation correct (stoc_minim - stoc)
Backend: Held order creation deducts stock immediately
Backend: GET /api/held-orders triggers expire_old_held_orders (stock stays deducted)
Backend: Sale creation logged with [SALE] prefix including BON number and TXN
Backend: Duplicate blocked logged as [SALE] WARNING
Backend: Cash operations logged with [CASH] prefix
Backend: Fiscal job queue logged with [FISCAL] prefix
Backend: Sale response includes transaction_id field
Frontend: Stock page loads with summary bar showing critical/warning counts
Frontend: Stock page shows Deficit column with negative values
Frontend: Stock page shows severity icons (yellow warning triangles)
Frontend: POS page sends transaction_id with format TXN-{timestamp}-{random}
Frontend: POS page sale completes successfully with toast notification
critical_code_review_comments: Held orders expiry behavior verified via code review: expire_old_held_orders() at line 1055 marks orders as 'expired' but does NOT restore stock (stock stays deducted). This is intentional per requirements.
seed_data_creation: Created test sales with transaction_id during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 features fully tested. Key points: (1) POST /api/sales with transaction_id is idempotent - returns same sale on retry. (2) GET /api/stock/alerts returns severity (critical/warning) and deficit fields, sorted by severity then deficit. (3) Professional logging uses [SALE], [CASH], [FISCAL] prefixes. (4) Held orders expire after 24h but stock STAYS deducted (not restored). (5) POS page generates transaction_id as TXN-{timestamp}-{random6chars}.

transaction_id_duplicate_prevention.details: POST /api/sales with same transaction_id returns same sale (idempotent). Without transaction_id, backend auto-generates unique one.

prefixes: [SALE] for sales with BON number and TXN

enhanced_stock_alerts.sorting: By severity (critical first) then by deficit descending

held_orders_expiry.behavior: After 24h expiry, stock STAYS deducted (not restored)
